How to confirm a bitcoin (BTC) bottom?How to confirm a bitcoin (BTC) bottom?

https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/06/12/there-s-one-simple-way-to-tell-whether-bitcoin-has-really-bottomed-right-now-it-hasn-t

  • （未能完成自動中譯：可檢查 LIBRETRANSLATE_URL，或設定 CURSOR_API_KEY 並保留 HERMERS_TRANSLATE_LLM=1 以啟用 LLM 備援。中文版暫附英文原文，於送審前改寫為繁體。）
  • Crypto traders, having seen bitcoin BTC$63,897.14, the largest cryptocurrency, bounce overnight to $64,000 from recent lows under…
  • There is a simple signal to get that confirmation.
  • Right now, it is saying the rebound has not started.
  • That signal comes from the widely followed momentum gauge called the relative strength index, or RSI.

  • Crypto traders, having seen bitcoin BTC$63,897.14, the largest cryptocurrency, bounce overnight to $64,000 from recent lows under…
  • There is a simple signal to get that confirmation.
  • Right now, it is saying the rebound has not started.
  • That signal comes from the widely followed momentum gauge called the relative strength index, or RSI.
  • The measure can range from 0 to 100.
